title: ItzBuble's Re:Create
description: A modified version of the Re:Create to be more configured and not bloated with "content creator" stuff.
body:
**ItzBuble's Re:Create** is an enhanced take on the **Re:Create** modpack, expanding its core mechanics with a refined selection of mods that push creativity, automation, and immersion to the next level. Built around the Create mod and its many addons, this modpack introduces new decorative elements, powerful machines, intricate automation, and immersive worldbuilding while maintaining high performance and visual fidelity.

### Key Features:
- **Expanded Create Mod Addons** ⚙️ – New machines, tools, and contraptions with Create: Steam 'n' Rails, Slice & Dice, Diesel Generators, and more!
- **Enhanced Visuals & Immersion** ✨ – Complementary & BSL shaders, dynamic lighting, 3D skins, immersive soundscapes, and realistic animations.
- **A Richer World** 🌎 – Tectonic, Naturalist, and Geophilic enhance terrain, wildlife, and world generation.
- **More Ways to Build & Decorate** 🏗️ – Chipped, Create Deco, Another Furniture, and Handcrafted give you infinite creativity.
- **Quality of Life Upgrades** 🔧 – Xaero's Minimap, BetterF3, Not Enough Crashes, and more ensure smooth gameplay.
- **Optimization & Performance** ⚡ – Powered by Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, and other essential performance mods.

Mainly my version configures the original mod so you wont have that FancyMenu bar at the top of the screen all the time, removes a lot of mods that generally are not meant for the average player like Axiom, Replay Mod, etc., and also has a few additions like some optimalization mods, more create addons, better backpack mod, and many more!
